case_title: KARL RIAUBA VS. BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING DATE: NOV-28-22 AT 8:30AM] FILED BY DEFENDANT BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. UNTIMELY BUT GRANTED. ABIDE BY DEADLINES IN THE FUTURE.

EXHIBIT (DEFENDANT - BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: NOV-28-22 AT 8:30AM};**HEARING CONTINUED, IN COURT,TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST TO DEC-29-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2022 - CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST TO DEC-29-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KARL RIAUBA IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DANEEA TUCKER, AVP, PARALEGAL. PLAINTIFF IS APPEARING BY ZOOM AS AN UNAUTHORIZED APPEARANCE. CASE CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST (SUBMISSION MUST BE RECEIVED AT THE COURTHOUSE TEN DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURTROOM CLERK THAT THE PARTIES ARE WORKING ON A SETTLEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,027.68 FILED BY RIAUBA, KARL AS TO DEFENDANT BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT REGARDING REQUEST TO POSTPONE REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT**DENIED**
EXHIBIT (DEFENDANT - BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE) FOR ZOOM HEARING - RECEIVED {HEARING: NOV-28-22 AT 8:30AM}
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [DANEEN TUCKER ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT - BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE] FILED BY DEFENDANT BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF KARL RIAUBA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANEEN TUCKER, AVP PARALEGAL VIA ZOOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT(CCSF)**DENIED** -DEFENDANT IS A CORPORATION WITH MANY EMPLOYEES-SOMEONE MUST BE AVAILABLE

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [DANEEN TUCKER APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT - BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
